REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF DEFENDANTS' ANSWERS. ARGUED AND THE COURT MODIFIES ITS RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. DEFENDANTS MAY FILE AMENDED ANSWERS AND INCLUDE THEIR ATTACHMENTS SO LONG AS THE BANK ACCOUNT NUMBERS THAT ARE ASSOCIATED WITH LANDLORDS ARE REDACTED. COUNSEL IS DIRECTED TO COORDINATE WITH THE RECORDS DEPARTMENT TO FACILITATE THE PHYSICAL REMOVAL OF THE ANSWERS FILED ON AUGUST 26, 2025, AND AUGUST 27, 2025. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-22-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF DEFENDANTS' ANSWERS

Appearances: Mark J. Seifert of Seifert Zuromski LLP (415.999.0901) for plaintiff and moving party; No other appearances.

Argued and the court modifies its ruling as follows: Granted. Defendants may file amended answers and include their attachments so long as the bank account numbers that are associated with landlords are redacted. Counsel is directed to coordinate with the records department to facilitate the physical removal of the answers filed on August 26, 2025, and August 27, 2025. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Sep-17-2025 Continued To Sep-22-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Seifert for plaintiff MM40Loom, LP.

Mr. Seifert contested the Court's tentative decision to take plaintiff's motion off calendar. The Court offered to continue the matter rather than order off calendar. Mr. Seifert agreed the Court's suggestion. The Court ruled as follows:

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION STRIKE PORTIONS OF DEFENDANTS' ANSWERS continued to September 22, 2025, at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501. Plaintiff shall give notice of the new hearing date.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-04-2025 Continued To Nov-12-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
